title: centaurea tougourensis
intro: Centaurea tougourensis, also known as Tougou's knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial plant that is native to China and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea tougourensis include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken internally to promote health and well-being.
